quotes.text: 计算机科学的本质不在于计算机本身，就像天文学的本质不在于望远镜。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 程序测试只能证明 bug 的存在，而不能证明 bug 不存在。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 面向对象编程是个极其糟糕的想法，只有在加州才能想出来。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 优秀的程序员写代码时，总是充分意识到自己脑袋的容量有限。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 如果你想要更高效的程序员，你会发现他们不应该浪费时间调试，他们应该从一开始就不引入 bug。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 当我们只有几台计算机时，我们有个温和的编程问题。面对强大百万倍的机器，我们面临着一个巨大的编程问题。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 简单和优雅不受欢迎，因为它们需要努力工作和自律才能实现，还需要教育才能被欣赏。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 计算机科学中唯一可靠的安全措施就是备份。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 完美的程序是不存在的，我们能做的只是不断接近完美。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 编程不仅仅是编码，更是思考的艺术。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: C 语言让你容易用枪打中自己的脚，C++ 让这变得更难，但当你做到时，会把整条腿炸飞。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 在 C++ 内部，有一个更小更干净的语言在挣扎着要出来。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 我一直希望我的电脑像电话一样易用；我的愿望实现了，因为我再也不知道怎么用我的电话了。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 只有两种编程语言：一种被人抱怨，一种没人用。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: C++ 是我最喜欢的垃圾回收语言，因为它产生的垃圾很少。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 如果你认为它很简单，那么你没有理解这个问题。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 用被认为糟糕的语言开发的有用系统，比用被赞美的优美语言开发的系统多得多。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 我们的文明运行在软件之上。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 设计和编程是人类活动；忘记这一点，一切都完了。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 没有人应该称自己为专业人士，如果他只会一种语言。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 软件开发中最重要的方面是清楚你正在尝试构建什么。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 我讨厌在优雅和效率之间做选择。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 声称拥有完美编程语言的人要么是推销员，要么是傻瓜，或者两者都是。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 简单的事情要简单化！
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 如果你从不失败，说明你不够努力。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 计算机本身以及尚未开发的软件，将彻底改变我们的学习方式。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 创新区分领导者和追随者。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 你的时间有限，不要浪费在过别人的生活上。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 保持饥饿，保持愚蠢。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 设计不仅仅是外观和感觉，设计是工作原理。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 有时候当你创新时，会犯错误。最好是快速承认并继续改进其他创新。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 质量比数量更重要。本垒打比三振好得多。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 我确信大约一半让初创公司成功的因素就是纯粹的毅力。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 不要陷入教条的陷阱——那是活在别人的思想成果里。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 机器能否思考这个问题，就像潜艇能否游泳一样无趣。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 我们只能看到前方很短的距离，但我们可以看到有很多事情需要去做。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 机器常常让我大吃一惊。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 如果我们希望机器能够思考，我们就不应该对它们不够诚实。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 数字计算机可以被描述为做那些原本由人类计算师完成的工作。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 我们想要的是能够从经验中学习的机器。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 如果机器不会犯错，那它也不是智能机器。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 我相信在世纪末，语言的使用和教育方式将发生巨大变化，人们将能够谈论机器思考而不会遭到反对。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 数学推理不仅仅是机械的推理。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 我们试图让机器模仿人类心智，而不是人类身体。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 计算机未来会像人类一样思考吗？这个问题本身就没有意义。
quotes.author: Alan Turing

quotes.text: 人工智能将是人类历史上最重要的事情。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: 强大 AI 的兴起要么是人类历史上最好的事情，要么是最糟糕的。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: 成功创造 AI 将是人类历史上最大的事件。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: AI 的发展可能会意味着人类的终结。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: 我们正处于创造能够独立思考的 AI 的边缘。这可能比人类本身更强大。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: AI 有潜力成为我们文明史上最大的事件，也可能是最糟糕的。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: 我没有说 AI 一定会毁灭人类，但如果 AI 自我进化并自我设计，它可能会超越我们。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: AI 可以带来巨大的好处，也可以带来巨大的危险。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: AI 的发展需要谨慎监管。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: 我们不应该让 AI 控制我们的命运。
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: 语言中最重要的短语是：'我们一直都是这样做的'。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 一艘停在港口的船是安全的，但那不是造船的目的。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 如果你做了一次，人们会称之为意外。但做了第三次，你就证明了自然法则！
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 如果是个好主意，就去做吧。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 请求原谅比请求许可更容易。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 我们倾向于忘记，计算机永远不会提出新的问题。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 我们不应该追求更大的计算机，而应该追求更多的计算机系统。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 你管理的是事情，不是人。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 我们淹没在信息中。人类必须将信息转化为智慧或知识。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 对我来说，编程不仅仅是一门重要的实用艺术，它也是知识基础的巨大事业。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 在拓荒时代，他们用牛来拉重物，当一头牛拉不动木头时，他们不会试图养一头更大的牛。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 我们过于注重管理，忘记了领导力。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 人类最危险的敌人是无知。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 如果你想要我的幽灵，就说'我们一直都是这样做的'，我会纠缠你 24 小时。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 我不会拿走你需要的，我只拿你想给的。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: 计算机就像空调，当你打开窗户时就没用了。
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: 优秀的程序员写的是人类能理解的代码，而不仅仅是机器能执行的代码。
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: 理论上的问题和实践中的问题是不一样的。在实践中，理论家和实践者是同一个人。
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: 大多数好的程序员写代码是为了自己，而不是为了别人看。
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: 如果你还在为性能担心，那你可能在做错误的事情。
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: 开源不仅仅是源代码，它是一种开发方法。
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Linux 只是我的爱好，我不会为了赚钱而做这件事。
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: 我宁愿做一个让普通人能使用的系统，而不是让专家赞叹的系统。
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: 软件就像性爱，免费的更好。
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: 预测未来的最好方式就是创造它。
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.text: 技术是你出生时还不存在的东西。
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.text: 简单比复杂更难：你必须努力工作才能让思维变得清晰，让事情变得简单。
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: 软件正在吞噬世界。
quotes.author: Marc Andreessen

quotes.text: AI 可能是人类有史以来最重要的工作。
quotes.author: Sundar Pichai

quotes.text: AI 的进步速度非常快。
quotes.author: Elon Musk

quotes.text: AI 不是要取代管理者，但会使用 AI 的管理者将取代不会使用的。
quotes.author: Erik Brynjolfsson

quotes.text: AI 是新的电力。
quotes.author: Andrew Ng

quotes.text: 网络安全不是一个产品，而是一个过程。
quotes.author: Bruce Schneier

quotes.text: 如果你认为技术能解决你的安全问题，那么你不理解问题，也不理解技术。
quotes.author: Bruce Schneier

quotes.text: 万维网不仅仅是连接机器，它连接的是人。
quotes.author: Tim Berners-Lee

quotes.text: 技术应该为每个人服务。
quotes.author: Tim Berners-Lee

quotes.text: 数字革命比书写甚至印刷的发明更重要。
quotes.author: Douglas Engelbart

quotes.text: 创新发生在人们被赋予提问自由和寻找答案资源的时候。
quotes.author: Eric Schmidt

quotes.text: 计算不再关于计算机，而是关于生活。
quotes.author: Nicholas Negroponte

quotes.text: 真正的愚蠢每次都战胜人工智能。
quotes.author: Terry Pratchett

quotes.text: 好的程序员是那种过马路前会两边看的人。
quotes.author: Doug Linder

quotes.text: 编码是今天的读写能力。
quotes.author: Maria Klawe

quotes.text: AI 没有道德，那是我们的工作。
quotes.author: Fei-Fei Li

quotes.text: 技术不是中立的，它反映了构建者的价值观。
quotes.author: Cathy O'Neil

quotes.text: 智能数据比大数据更重要。
quotes.author: Hilary Mason

quotes.text: 我们正处于 AI 的黄金时代初期。
quotes.author: Demis Hassabis

quotes.text: 在技术领域，谁控制平台，谁就控制叙事。
quotes.author: Ben Thompson

quotes.text: 代码没有测试，从设计上就是坏的。
quotes.author: Jeff Atwood

quotes.text: 你写的代码让你成为程序员，你删除的代码让你成为好程序员，你不必写的代码让你成为伟大的程序员。
quotes.author: Jeff Atwood

quotes.text: 最终源代码才是真正的软件设计。
quotes.author: Jeff Atwood

quotes.text: 不要浪费时间重构从不改变的代码。
quotes.author: Jeff Atwood

quotes.text: 当你专注于语法审查时，你会错过架构、安全、设计和意图。
quotes.author: Jeff Atwood

quotes.text: 面向对象编程支持封装，从而提高软件的可重用性、可完善性、可测试性、可维护性和可扩展性。
quotes.author: Grady Booch

quotes.text: 好的软件的功能是让复杂的事情显得简单。
quotes.author: Grady Booch

quotes.text: 如果你不会编程，你只是在表面摸索可能性。
quotes.author: Chris Bosh

quotes.text: 网络安全远比 IT 话题重要——它是业务必需品。
quotes.author: Raj Samani

quotes.text: 我们要么在写代码，要么在重构；我们从不同时做这两件事。
quotes.author: Kent Beck

quotes.text: 对于任何问题，都可以再加一层间接来解决，当然除了间接层太多的问题。
quotes.author: David J. Wheeler

quotes.text: 注释和代码不一致时，两者可能都错了。
quotes.author: Norm Schryer

quotes.text: 为未来而教；你必须生活在其中。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 将程序员视为白痴的组织，很快就会拥有愿意且能够表现得像白痴的程序员。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 不要耍小聪明。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 总是对'当然'保持怀疑：'当然'不是理由。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 小心'显而易见'；它通常意味着'我没有仔细想过'。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 太多时候，'计算机科学'既不是科学也不是关于计算机。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 太多时候，'软件工程'既不是工程也不是关于软件。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 尽早测试，经常测试。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 空间就是时间。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 唯一比计算机性能增长更快的是人类的期望。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 即使是我也无法设计一个更漂亮的语言。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 我的理想是让 C++ 成为许多事情中第二好的语言。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 不可能有一种语言对所有人和所有事都是最好的。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 对于每个应用，都应该有一种理想的语言专门为此设计。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 即使我错了，我也不会有任何罪恶感。因为在这种情况下，错的不是我，而是现实。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: C++11 感觉像是一门新语言。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 不幸的是，人们不仅想要简单，他们想要不可能的东西：更简单的语言，更多的功能，而且不破坏现有代码。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 学习外语和文化很重要。它帮助你思考，让你成为更好的人。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 语言设计是宏大思想和琐碎细节的奇特混合。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 你必须先学会跑，才能学会走。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 第一个足够好的解决方案很少是最好的解决方案。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 熟悉经常被误认为是简单。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 请记住，不要在没有测量显示需要的情况下进行优化。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 软件开发中最基本的问题是复杂性。处理复杂性只有一种基本方法：分而治之。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 许多人把简单和熟悉混淆了。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 找到展示错误的最小程序是一个强大的调试工具。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 你知道的越多，你就越知道自己不知道的越多。
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: 我上面代码中的 bug 我已经证明了它正确，但没有试过。
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: 过早优化是万恶之源。
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: 计算机科学不能从任何机器被定义，就像生物学不能从显微镜被定义一样。
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: 程序员们浪费了大量时间担心或怀疑他们的程序中的小效率。
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: 让我们改变一下：传统的程序员是认为清晰性对机器重要的人；现代程序员是认为清晰性对程序员重要的人。
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: 一个优秀的程序员总是知道他的思维能力的严格限制；因此他以完全的谦逊来处理编程任务。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 使用 COBOL 会残害心智；因此，教授它应该被视为犯罪。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: APL 是一个错误，被完美地执行了。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 在物理学中，如果你有不理解的东西，你总是可以躲在自然的未知深度后面。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 不要因为我认为有能力的编程对'普通程序员'来说太难而责怪我。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 使用机器模仿人类心智的努力总是让我觉得很愚蠢。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 当我们接受程序员的责任不仅是生产正确的程序，还要以令人信服的方式证明其正确性时。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 如果工具是编程语言，这种影响就是对我们思维习惯的影响。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 我们应该以更好的编程为目标，前提是我们充分认识到其巨大的困难。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 进步只有在我们将自己训练成思考程序而不把它们视为可执行代码时才可能。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 试图敦促世界改变方式是没有什么意义的，只要这个世界仍然相信它的方式完全足够。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 人们谈论编程，好像它是一个生产过程，用'产生的代码行数'来衡量'程序员生产力'。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 编程语言是对我们思维习惯有深远影响的工具。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 我们只有在尊重人类心智的内在限制，并以非常谦逊的程序员的态度来处理任务时，才能做好编程工作。
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: 在先锋时代，他们用牛来拉重物，当一头牛拉不动时，他们不会试图养一头更大的牛。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 我们倾向于忘记，没有计算机会问新的问题。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 我们不应该追求更大的计算机，而应该追求更多的计算机系统。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 我们过于注重管理，忘记了领导力。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 我们淹没在信息中。人类必须将信息转化为智慧或知识。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 对我来说，编程不仅仅是一门重要的实用艺术，它也是知识基础的巨大事业。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 在任何时候，都有一条线代表你的老板会相信什么。
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: 生活就像骑自行车。为了保持平衡，你必须继续前进。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 我们不能用制造问题时的同一思维水平来解决问题。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 逻辑会带你从 A 到 B，想象力会带你到任何地方。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 重要的是不要停止 questioning。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 我没有什么特殊的天赋，我只是充满好奇。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 唯一真正有价值的是直觉。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 如果你不能简单解释它，说明你理解得不够透彻。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 学习不是教育的全部，教育的全部是激发创造力。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 在危机中，想象力比知识更重要。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 世界之所以危险，不是因为那些做坏事的人，而是因为那些袖手旁观的人。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 任何聪明人都可以把事情变得更大、更复杂、更暴力。需要相反的方向和相当的勇气才能把事情变简单。
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 代码是写给人看的，只是恰好机器能执行。
quotes.author: Harold Abelson

quotes.text: 程序必须易于理解，而不仅仅是能运行。
quotes.author: Harold Abelson

quotes.text: 计算机科学教育不能使任何人成为专家程序员，就像学习画笔和颜料不能使人成为绘画专家一样。
quotes.author: Harold Abelson

quotes.text: 好的代码本身就是最好的文档。
quotes.author: Steve McConnell

quotes.text: 测量是编程的本质。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 向后期项目添加人手只会让它更晚完成。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 概念完整性是系统设计中最重要的考虑因素。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 计划抛弃一个系统；你迟早会这样做。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 没有银弹：软件工程中没有任何单一技术或管理承诺能在十年内将生产力提高一个数量级。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 构建一个独立的系统很难，但构建一个独立的系统更难。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 软件熵：任何软件的熵都会随时间增加。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 程序员的时间应该花在思考上，而不是打字上。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 好的判断来自经验，经验来自坏的判断。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 软件是复杂的，这是它的本质。
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: 编程是理解的过程。
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: 在计算机科学中，我们总是站在巨人的肩膀上，因为我们总是重新发明轮子。
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: LISP 程序员知道所有东西的价值，但不知道任何东西的价格。
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: 优化阻碍进化。
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: 每个程序都是另一个程序的一部分，而且不会很快完成。
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: 在编程中，就像在生活中一样，有一个简单的方法来做任何事情，和一个困难的方法。简单的方法通常更难发现。
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: 一个用 LISP 写的程序可以做任何用其他语言写的程序能做的事情，而且做得更好。
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: Syntactic sugar causes cancer of the semicolon.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: Every program is a part of some other program, and rarely fits.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: If a program manipulates a large amount of data, it does so in a small number of ways.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: Simplicity does not precede complexity, but follows it.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: It is better to have 100 functions operate on one data structure than 10 functions on 10 data structures.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: There is nothing as deceptive as an obvious fact.
quotes.author: Arthur Conan Doyle

quotes.text: The first principle is that you must not fool yourself — and you are the easiest person to fool.
quotes.author: Richard Feynman

quotes.text: What I cannot create, I do not understand.
quotes.author: Richard Feynman

quotes.text: Science is the belief in the ignorance of experts.
quotes.author: Richard Feynman

quotes.text: The most important thing is to never stop questioning.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Try not to become a person of success, but rather try to become a person of value.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The only source of knowledge is experience.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Logic will get you from A to B. Imagination will take you everywhere.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The measure of intelligence is the ability to change.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Education is what remains after one has forgotten what one has learned in school.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The important thing is not to stop questioning. Curiosity has its own reason for existing.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Do not worry about your difficulties in Mathematics. I can assure you mine are still greater.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Science without religion is lame, religion without science is blind.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Peace cannot be kept by force; it can only be achieved by understanding.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The world as we have created it is a process of our thinking. It cannot be changed without changing our thinking.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Weakness of attitude becomes weakness of character.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: I speak to everyone in the same way, whether he is the garbage man or the president of the university.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Learn from yesterday, live for today, hope for tomorrow. The important thing is not to stop questioning.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The true sign of intelligence is not knowledge but imagination.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Knowledge is experience. Everything else is just information.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: I have no special talents. I am only passionately curious.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The only thing that interferes with my learning is my education.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Creativity is intelligence having fun.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The difference between stupidity and genius is that genius has its limits.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: There are only two ways to live your life. One is as though nothing is a miracle. The other is as though everything is a miracle.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: I am enough of an artist to draw freely upon my imagination.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Anyone who has never made a mistake has never tried anything new.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The only way to escape the corruptible effect of praise is to go on working.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Reality is merely an illusion, albeit a very persistent one.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The most beautiful thing we can experience is the mysterious. It is the source of all true art and science.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Look deep into nature, and then you will understand everything better.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: A clever person solves a problem. A wise person avoids it.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: It is the supreme art of the teacher to awaken joy in creative expression and knowledge.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The value of a man should be seen in what he gives and not in what he is able to receive.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: I never think of the future - it comes soon enough.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Time is an illusion.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The only reason for time is so that everything doesn't happen at once.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Space is not a thing, but a relationship between things.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Matter tells space how to curve; space tells matter how to move.
quotes.author: John Wheeler

quotes.text: The universe is not required to be in perfect harmony with human ambition.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: We are a way for the cosmos to know itself.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: Extraordinary claims require extraordinary evidence.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: For me, it is far better to grasp the Universe as it really is than to persist in delusion, however satisfying and reassuring.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: The cosmos is within us. We are made of star-stuff. We are a way for the universe to know itself.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: Science is a way of thinking much more than it is a body of knowledge.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: We've arranged a global civilization in which most crucial elements profoundly depend on science and technology.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: Imagination will often carry us to worlds that never were. But without it we go nowhere.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: When you make the finding yourself - even if you're the last person on Earth to see the light - you'll never forget it.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: Understanding is a kind of ecstasy.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: We live in a society exquisitely dependent on science and technology, in which hardly anyone knows anything about science and technology.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: The absence of evidence is not the evidence of absence.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: If you wish to make an apple pie from scratch, you must first invent the universe.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: Books break the shackles of time. A book is proof that humans are capable of working magic.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.text: Part of the inhumanity of the computer is that, once it is competently programmed and working smoothly, it is completely honest.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.text: The saddest aspect of life right now is that science gathers knowledge faster than society gathers wisdom.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.text: The most exciting phrase to hear in science, the one that heralds new discoveries, is not 'Eureka!' but 'That's funny...'
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.text: I do not fear computers. I fear the lack of them.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.text: The true delight is in the finding out rather than in the knowing.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.text: Never let your sense of morals prevent you from doing what is right.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.text: Violence is the last refuge of the incompetent.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.text: The most important of our responsibilities is to ensure that we have a future.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.text: Life is pleasant. Death is peaceful. It's the transition that's troublesome.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.text: Write what you know. That should leave you with a lot of free time.
quotes.author: Howard Nemerov

quotes.text: The best way to find out if you can trust somebody is to trust them.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: There is nothing noble in being superior to your fellow man; true nobility is being superior to your former self.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: The first draft of anything is shit.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called Huckleberry Finn.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: Courage is grace under pressure.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: There is no friend as loyal as a book.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: The world breaks everyone, and afterward, some are strong at the broken places.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: All things truly wicked start from innocence.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: Never confuse movement with action.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: The best way to know if people are good is to trust them.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: Happiness in intelligent people is the rarest thing I know.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: There are some things which cannot be learned quickly, and time, which is all we have, must be paid heavily for their acquiring.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: Every man's life ends the same way. It is only the details of how he lived and how he died that distinguish one man from another.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: As you get older three things happen. The first is your memory goes, and I can't remember the other two.
quotes.author: Norman Wisdom

quotes.text: Give a man a program and frustrate him for a day. Teach a man to program and frustrate him for a lifetime.
quotes.author: Wally Feij

quotes.text: The programmer, like the poet, works only slightly removed from pure thought-stuff. He builds his castles in the air, from air, creating by exertion of the imagination.
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: Show me your flowcharts and conceal your tables, and I shall continue to be mystified. Show me your tables, and I won't usually need your flowcharts; they'll be obvious.
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: The bearing of a child takes nine months, no matter how many women are assigned.
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: Adding manpower to a late software project makes it later.
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: The fool doth think he is wise, but the wise man knows himself to be a fool.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: All that glitters is not gold.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: This above all: to thine own self be true.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: The course of true love never did run smooth.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: What's in a name? That which we call a rose by any other name would smell as sweet.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: To be, or not to be, that is the question.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: The rest is silence.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: Good night, good night! Parting is such sweet sorrow.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: A rose by any other name would smell as sweet.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: All the world's a stage, and all the men and women merely players.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: Cowards die many times before their deaths; The valiant never taste of death but once.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: If music be the food of love, play on.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: Some are born great, some achieve greatness, and some have greatness thrust upon them.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: We know what we are, but know not what we may be.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: It is not in the stars to hold our destiny but in ourselves.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: Love all, trust a few, do wrong to none.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: Be not afraid of greatness. Some are born great, some achieve greatness, and others have greatness thrust upon them.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: The web does not just connect machines, it connects people.
quotes.author: Tim Berners-Lee

quotes.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
quotes.author: Matt Mullenweg

quotes.text: The advance of technology is based on making it fit in so that you don't really even notice it.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: We're changing the world with technology.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: The number one benefit of information technology is that it empowers people to do what they want to do.
quotes.author: Steve Ballmer

quotes.text: The best minds of my generation are thinking about how to make people click ads.
quotes.author: Jeff Hammerbacher

quotes.text: The future belongs to those who understand technology and design it to serve people.
quotes.author: John Maeda

quotes.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
quotes.author: Alvin Toffler

quotes.text: The art challenges the technology, and the technology inspires the art.
quotes.author: John Lasseter

quotes.text: Technology is anything that wasn't around when you were born.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.text: We are moving from a world where we have to understand computers to a world where they will understand us.
quotes.author: Jensen Huang

quotes.text: As a technologist, I see how AI and the fourth industrial revolution will impact every aspect of people's lives.
quotes.author: Fei-Fei Li

quotes.text: There's no technology that can't be broken down by a determined human.
quotes.author: Kevin Mitnick

quotes.text: Cybersecurity is much more than an IT topic—it's a business imperative.
quotes.author: Raj Samani

quotes.text: In technology, whoever controls the platform controls the narrative.
quotes.author: Ben Thompson

quotes.text: Smart data is more important than big data.
quotes.author: Hilary Mason

quotes.text: AI doesn't have ethics. That's our job.
quotes.author: Fei-Fei Li

quotes.text: Technology is not neutral. It reflects the values of those who build it.
quotes.author: Cathy O'Neil

quotes.text: The real question is, when will we draft an artificial intelligence bill of rights?
quotes.author: Gray Scott

quotes.text: We're at the beginning of a golden era of AI.
quotes.author: Demis Hassabis

quotes.text: AI is probably the most important thing humanity has ever worked on.
quotes.author: Sundar Pichai

quotes.text: The pace of progress in artificial intelligence is incredibly fast.
quotes.author: Elon Musk

quotes.text: Success in creating AI would be the biggest event in human history.
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: The rise of powerful AI will be either the best or the worst thing ever to happen to humanity.
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.text: AI is the new electricity.
quotes.author: Andrew Ng

quotes.text: AI is not going to replace managers, but managers who use AI will replace those who don't.
quotes.author: Erik Brynjolfsson

quotes.text: Coding is today's literacy.
quotes.author: Maria Klawe

quotes.text: If you think technology can solve your security problems, then you don't understand the problems and you don't understand the technology.
quotes.author: Bruce Schneier

quotes.text: A good programmer is someone who always looks both ways before crossing a one-way street.
quotes.author: Doug Linder

quotes.text: The digital revolution is far more significant than the invention of writing or even of printing.
quotes.author: Douglas Engelbart

quotes.text: Innovation happens when people are given the freedom to ask questions and the resources to find the answers.
quotes.author: Eric Schmidt

quotes.text: Computing is not about computers anymore. It is about living.
quotes.author: Nicholas Negroponte

quotes.text: Real stupidity beats artificial intelligence every time.
quotes.author: Terry Pratchett

quotes.text: 1946 年：ENIAC 诞生，世界上第一台通用电子计算机
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1947 年：贝尔实验室发明晶体管，开启电子革命
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1958 年：杰克·基尔比发明集成电路
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1969 年：C 语言诞生，丹尼斯·里奇和肯·汤普森创造 Unix
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1971 年：Intel 4004，世界上第一款微处理器
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1975 年：Microsoft 成立，比尔·盖茨和保罗·艾伦创立
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1976 年：Apple 公司成立，史蒂夫·乔布斯和史蒂夫·沃兹尼亚克创立
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1983 年：TCP/IP 协议成为 ARPANET 标准，互联网诞生
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1984 年：Apple Macintosh 发布，首次将图形用户界面带给大众
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1989 年：蒂姆·伯纳斯 - 李发明万维网
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1991 年：Linux 内核发布，林纳斯·托瓦兹开创开源操作系统
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1993 年：Mosaic 浏览器发布，互联网开始普及
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1994 年：Netscape Navigator 发布，浏览器大战开始
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1995 年：Java 语言发布，'一次编写，到处运行'
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1998 年：Google 成立，改变搜索引擎格局
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1999 年：Wi-Fi 技术开始普及，无线网络时代来临
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2001 年：Wikipedia 上线，知识共享新时代
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2004 年：Facebook 成立，社交媒体时代开启
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2007 年：iPhone 发布，智能手机革命开始
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2008 年：Bitcoin 诞生，区块链时代开启
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2010 年：iPad 发布，平板电脑时代来临
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2011 年：Siri 发布，语音助手进入主流
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2012 年：深度学习突破，AlexNet 赢得 ImageNet 竞赛
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2014 年：AlphaGo 击败人类围棋冠军，AI 里程碑
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2016 年：TensorFlow 开源，机器学习民主化
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2017 年：Transformer 架构提出，NLP 革命开始
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2018 年：BERT 模型发布，自然语言处理新纪元
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2020 年：GPT-3 发布，大语言模型时代来临
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2022 年：ChatGPT 发布，AI 对话助手普及
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2023 年：GPT-4 发布，多模态 AI 成为现实
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1843 年：Ada Lovelace 编写了世界上第一个计算机程序
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1936 年：Alan Turing 提出图灵机概念，奠定计算理论基础
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1945 年：冯·诺依曼提出存储程序概念，现代计算机架构诞生
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1956 年：'人工智能'一词在达特茅斯会议上首次提出
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1964 年：IBM System/360 发布，兼容机时代开始
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1972 年：Pong 游戏发布，电子游戏产业诞生
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1977 年：Apple II 发布，个人电脑时代开始
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1981 年：IBM PC 发布，PC 兼容机标准确立
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1985 年：Windows 1.0 发布，微软进入图形界面时代
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1990 年：World Wide Web 首次公开，互联网新时代
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 1995 年：Amazon 和 eBay 成立，电子商务时代开启
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2000 年：互联网泡沫破裂，科技行业大洗牌
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2003 年：Skype 发布，VoIP 通信革命
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2005 年：YouTube 成立，视频分享时代来临
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2006 年：AWS 推出 EC2，云计算时代开始
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2009 年：3G 网络普及，移动互联网爆发
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2013 年：4G LTE 普及，高速移动网络时代
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2015 年：ResNet 发布，深度学习新突破
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2019 年：5G 商用，万物互联时代开启
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 2021 年：GitHub Copilot 发布，AI 编程助手时代
quotes.author: 里程碑

quotes.text: 计算机界第一定律：摩尔定律——集成电路上可容纳的晶体管数目约每 18-24 个月增加一倍
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 安迪 - 比尔定律：Andy gives, Bill takes away——硬件性能提升总被软件消耗
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 梅特卡夫定律：网络的价值与联网用户数的平方成正比
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 阿姆达尔定律：系统的性能提升受限于其最慢的部分
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 布鲁克斯定律：向延期的软件项目添加人手，只会让它更延期
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 康威定律：设计系统的组织，其产生的设计等同于组织间的沟通结构
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 林纳斯定律：只要有足够多的眼睛，就可让所有问题浮现
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 帕金森定律：工作会膨胀到占满所有可用时间
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 墨菲定律：凡是可能出错的事就一定会出错
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 90-90 定律：前 90% 的代码占用 90% 的开发时间，后 90% 的代码也占用 90% 的开发时间
quotes.author: 定律

quotes.text: 最慢的链接决定整个网络的速度
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 安全是一个过程，不是一个产品
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 没有绝对安全的系统，只有相对安全的系统
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 用户是安全链中最薄弱的一环
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 密码是安全的第一道防线，也是最容易被突破的
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 备份、备份、再备份——重要的事说三遍
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 不要相信用户输入，永远不要
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 过早优化是万恶之源
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 代码是负债，不是资产——能少写就少写
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 如果你不能解释它，说明你不理解它
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 测试不能证明程序正确，只能证明 bug 存在
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 文档和代码不一致时，通常两者都错了
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 任何足够复杂和低层的协议，都会重新实现一个低效、有 bug 的 HTTP 客户端
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 所有的抽象都是有漏洞的
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 不要重复自己——DRY 原则
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 保持简单愚蠢——KISS 原则
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 你不需要它——YAGNI 原则
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 关注点分离——SoC 原则
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 最少知识原则——LoD 原则
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 开放封闭原则——对扩展开放，对修改封闭
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 单一职责原则——一个类只负责一个职责
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 里氏替换原则——子类必须能够替换父类
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 接口隔离原则——客户端不应依赖它不需要的接口
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 依赖倒置原则——依赖抽象，不依赖具体
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 先让它工作，再让它正确，最后让它快
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 测量后再优化，不要猜测
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 微优化是万恶之源
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 宏优化才是王道
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 算法和数据结构决定性能上限
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 缓存是计算机科学中唯一真正重要的事
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 并发很难，分布式更难
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 网络是不可靠的
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 延迟是不可避免的
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 带宽不是无限的
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 安全需要层层防护
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 最小权限原则——只给必要的权限
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 纵深防御——多层安全措施
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 默认拒绝——除非明确允许，否则一律拒绝
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 日志是调试和审计的基础
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 监控是运维的眼睛
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 自动化是规模化的前提
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 基础设施即代码——IaC
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 持续集成，持续交付，持续部署
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: DevOps 是一种文化，不是工具
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 云原生是未来，但不是唯一
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 容器化是趋势，但不是银弹
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 微服务是架构选择，不是目标
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 单体应用也有其价值
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 技术选型要适合团队和项目
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 不要为了技术而技术
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 简单是最好的复杂
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 优雅比效率更重要
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 可读性比聪明更重要
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 维护性比功能更重要
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 文档是代码的一部分
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 测试是代码的一部分
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 重构是持续的过程
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 技术债务迟早要还
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 快速失败，经常失败，从失败中学习
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 唯一不变的是变化本身
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 学习是程序员的终身任务
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 分享知识，共同成长
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 开源改变世界
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 社区是开源的灵魂
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 协作比竞争更重要
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 多样性带来创新
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 包容性让社区更强大
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 技术向善，用科技改变世界
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 隐私是基本人权
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 数据是有价值的资产
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 算法也可能有偏见
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: AI 需要伦理约束
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 技术应该服务于人类
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 数字鸿沟需要被弥合
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 可持续发展是科技的责任
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 绿色计算是未来方向
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 碳中和需要科技助力
quotes.author: 警示

quotes.text: 科技向善，共创美好未来
quotes.author: 警示
